rulings.Case Title: CLAIRE PIERCE VS. THEODORE M SCALIONE JR et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 14, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT GREGORY KELLY DBA BEAUTIFUL HOMES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, first cause of action San Francisco Rent Ordinance tenant re harrrassment; ordinance on it's face sufficient re contractor. Sustain with leave to amend as to second, third and fourth causes of action to set forth specific facts showing agency and or conspiracy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A VS. VICKY LEE (DBA "QUIZNO'S") et al - RECLASS TO CONTRACT ACTION 4/27/11
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft Alameda Holdings, Llc To Respond To Written Discovery, And Requesting Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 14, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Defendant Alameda Holdings, Llc To Respond To Written Discovery, And Requesting Monetary Sanctions. Grant as to form interrogatories and inspection demand, plus $840 sanctions fees and costs. = (501/REQ)
